svg.title: Nostragoalus — the football oracle
svg.desc: A circular gold-rimmed emblem on a deep cosmic disc: a glowing crystal ball on an ornate stand holds a stylized soccer ball drawn as a star constellation, framed by the curved wordmark Nostragoalus above and The Football Oracle below, with a shooting star and scattered stars.

text.style: fill:rgb(244, 212, 136);stroke:none;color:rgb(255, 255, 255);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:"Cinzel Decorative", Cinzel, "Anthropic Serif", Georgia, "Times New Roman", serif, serif;font-size:33px;font-weight:700;text-anchor:middle;dominant-baseline:auto
